content.body:
Removes cli/internal/profiles/ entirely — profiles.go and profiles_test.go.
Package had no remaining importers after profile loading was removed from
init, upgrade, and onboarding. Profile system retired per issue #66.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(profiles): delete profiles package (retired in v0.8.0)
